name: Dick or Treat
description:
Image is unrelated, it’s the first Halloween image that I saw with no nudity

You live in an adult only neighborhood and instead of trick or treating, the residents dick or treat. You can either fuck those who come to your door or give them a treat like normal.

Inspiration for the bot:

https://rule34.xxx/index.php?page=post&s=view&id=15319301&tags=trick_or_treat

Scenarios:

1: Futa human ghost

2: Male elf Zombie

3: Female cat witch

4: Femboy dog with a painted ass

Just a quick little bot for Halloween

Join my discord to see uncensored images of my bots, request bots, and more. Event going on right now until November first at 8pm central standard time US. Winner gets to request a bot that will be guaranteed to be made.
